text: vv. 1, 2. Almost every word in these two verses is interpreted by scholars in a variety of ways; nor is there any agreement as to the bearing of what is said. The race referred to may be the Egyptians, or the Ethiopians, or some nation still more distant; and it is not clear whether the messengers in verse 2 are being sent back to give a message to their own race, or sent on their way to give a message to some other race, for example the Assyrians. Some think the prophet is discouraging an Egyptian offer of alliance (IV Kg. 18.24).
Owing to the doubts alluded to above, it is difficult to say what nation is referred to by the ‘it’ of this verse.
